## Accepted structured facts

- **datasets:** KITTI 00, KITTI 05, KITTI 06, KITTI 07, Freiburg Campus, Ford Campus — `source_fact`; manual, p. 4, § IV-A. Dataset and Experimental Settings
- **input_unit:** single 3D point cloud — `source_fact`; manual, p. 1, § Abstract
- **invariances:** none — `researcher_judgement`; manual, p. 2–3, § III-B. Pre-processing of a Point Cloud, Algorithm 1
- **representation:** multi-plane 2D projections, density signatures, SVD global descriptor — `source_fact`; manual, p. 1–3, § Abstract;III. Multiview 2D Projection Algorithm, Algorithm 1
- **uses_learning:** no — `researcher_judgement`; manual, p. 2–3, § III. Multiview 2D Projection Algorithm, Algorithm 1
- **uses_sequence:** no — `researcher_judgement`; manual, p. 4, § IV-A. Dataset and Experimental Settings
